name: Phuc
education: Pursuing a Bachelor's degree in History at UIT
online_behavior: Phuc often searches for historical content online, uses social media to connect with peers, and occasionally participates in online forums related to history and technology.
information_needs: Learning resources for technology in education
unique_attributes: Combines interest in history with technology
summary: Chau Hoang Phuc is a 23-year-old history undergraduate at UIT in Ho Chi Minh City. He is passionate about Vietnamese history and keen on integrating technology into education. Phuc is bilingual, speaks Vietnamese fluently, and is improving his English skills. He actively seeks out historical content and engages with the tech community, embodying a blend of cultural heritage and modern technological interests.
